title: DirectoryRequest
description: DirectoryRequest: Used to query Directories or Files.

Location.description: Directory and/or Files from this Location will be queried.

SearchSubdirectories.description: If enabled, look also in subdirectories.

MaxNesting.description:
If IncludeSubdirectories is true, this sets the maximum subdirectiory nesting level to look in.
Defaults to -1 which corresponds to no limit.

MaxDirectories.description:
Sets the maximum number of Directories to retrieve, useful when using IncludeSubdirectories.
Defaults to -1 which corresponds to no limit.

Exclusions.description:
These directories will be excluded from the results.
You can also specify string Full Paths.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
